_comment: Golden Poseidon2 vectors generated from the pinned Noir `poseidon` v0.2.0 lib (BN254, t=4, RATE=3, IV = in_len * 2^64, output = state[0]). Regenerate with: cd test/golden-gen && source ../../../env.sh && nargo test --show-output. These are byte-for-byte identical to soroban-poseidon poseidon2_hash::<4, BnScalar>. Values are 32-byte big-endian field elements (0x-prefixed, 64 hex chars).
